todo.title: Delete core/hotkey.py
todo.description: Remove core/hotkey.py entirely — pynput is a resource-heavy keylogger that breaks on Wayland. The existing IPC QLocalServer + xfconf-query system shortcut (Ctrl+Alt+V) is the correct Linux-native approach. Also clean up the dead comment in dashboard.py.

todo.title: Standalone Autostart Script
todo.description: Create scripts/setup_autostart.py — a pure-Python script that writes ~/.config/autostart/DotGhostBoard.desktop and ~/.local/share/applications/DotGhostBoard.desktop without requiring bash or install.sh.

todo.title: Real App Icon (SVG + PNG)
todo.description: Create data/icons/ghost.svg with neon ghost design (#00ff41, #0f0f0f). Update generate_icon.py to render SVG → PNG at all sizes. The fallback QPainter circle in dashboard.py is replaced automatically when icon.png is regenerated.

todo.title: Settings Panel
todo.description: New ui/settings.py QDialog with: (1) Max history spinbox [10-5000, default 200], (2) Clear history on exit checkbox [default off — privacy feature], (3) Theme combo [Dark Neon / Light coming soon], (4) Read-only hotkey hint label. Reads/writes data/settings.json. Dashboard loads settings on startup and enforces them.

todo.title: Keyboard Navigation (Up/Down/Enter)
todo.description: Override keyPressEvent in Dashboard: Up/Down moves focus between visible cards, Enter/Space copies focused card. Use scroll.ensureWidgetVisible(card) so the scrollbar follows automatically. Add set_focused(bool) to ItemCard + focused QSS rule in ghost.qss.

todo.title: Double-click Card to Paste
todo.description: Override mouseDoubleClickEvent in ItemCard → emit sig_copy(self.item_id). Instant copy without needing to click the copy button.
